race.comment: FIRST FEELING (6) has put together back-to-back placings, the latest when a distant third over this track and trip. No tougher this time and is well placed to finally find winning ways. SOCIAL DANCER (8) has had plenty of cracks at getting off the mark without success but she does boast a sound record here with two top-three finishes from four starts. Will be thereabouts. CHILD'S PLAY (9) is a first-starter by Graff from Childhood who has proven a strong producer including winners at black type level. Filled a minor placing in her most recent trial at Port Augusta. Keeping a close eye on betting. DRAGON FISH (5) struggled to fire a shot in her first shot on the dirt. Better for that and has prior form that can give this a big shake.
